## LTC Properties acquires senior housing communities; valuation questioned after move

Peripheral macro signal on senior housing demand and demographic tailwinds; no direct BCTK portfolio exposure, making this low-relevance for a technology-focused PM.

- LTC Properties makes senior housing acquisitions — LTC is not a watchlist name.
- Article questions whether the stock is now overvalued following the acquisitions.
